conditions.displayName: A failed task attempt in five minutes

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type="cloud_tasks_queue" AND resource.labels.queue_id="wony-jobs" AND metric.type="cloudtasks.googleapis.com/queue/task_attempt_count" AND metric.labels.response_code!="ok"

documentation.content: Cloud Tasks recorded a non-ok dispatch attempt. Check task retry metadata in the structured generation logs.
